textByHashes.45b6ba95731ffd0c447d03bbba247e17f1791147: We can't have him declaring war all the time. Even if it would give us a chance to show off our military might.
textByHashes.88c2a3f42fe2a241915c1229c6e0ace6f15cca62: And I could finally show him that archery isn't a cowardly skill. If only we had an army, we could prove ourselves against the Etceterians.
textByHashes.e1de92faa3dff0a9b983bfc82944458607bc5fdc: Better than archery? What is it?
textByHashes.086b9210578730ca63e90d2f3104ca0847de2775: But we don't have an army, so it's our best hope.
textByHashes.5079b3f258e74caa6cf8893fc213897012ab7c18: Good day, . Have you come to see my brother?
textByHashes.416a406ebf420c4bcd3688d951e0e24613ab7404: I'm afraid I haven't managed to find a priest for our marriage yet.
textByHashes.5c0a6cf56c580c962c28880653cd8da65264b453: I'll ask Father if he minds us discussing this in the throne room for a while.
textByHashes.918a69727021776fd6cc20212b02de05ffea15e1: It's terrible, my dear! My father's been arguing with the Queen of Etceteria, and has managed to start a war again.
textByHashes.835467f41347a866de83f66c8f51fe02e57e57d3: It's terrible, my dear friend! My father's been arguing with the Queen of Etceteria, and has managed to start a war again.
textByHashes.d7a99b1c649e464cf0e2bfac793e7a76f547148d: It's awful that your work has been undone by such an accident.
textByHashes.104f506563d96b3060b5d7050182172e33e27bc2: Well, if my father had had something to occupy him, he wouldn't have gotten bored and decided to argue with Queen Sigrid again.
textByHashes.1ee91046ca36ad94420db05647577422ca5ee038: Perhaps it's an odd idea, my dear, but since we don't have an army, we can hardly declare war...
textByHashes.8233ecbc8fd2deb610fae9c22eae76d81a804071: Perhaps it's an odd idea, my dear friend, but since we don't have an army, we can hardly declare war...
textByHashes.d1f9d6686fce053b3d0d27f4662abe248201a48e: Though his ideas can sometimes be a little... strange.
textByHashes.02eb85b47cbab64505e40b4069e9512b051005e3: I'm just telling about your poetic accomplishments.
textByHashes.cd42da8a55e3683cf12a9b2b825b4a8277a765e6: So, will you talk to our father and Queen Sigrid, then?
textByHashes.14d987fc78060e2dc5d1745f29ef9d159f23168c: I'm sure you can manage to arrange it all.
textByHashes.d02ed530686a44e4a5cc27c720026d15a8d5e104: I'm sure you'll manage to do it, dear.
textByHashes.a4445388ef2bff413e8c5b0f1dc230b245fe4089: I'm sure you'll manage to do it, dear friend.
textByHashes.12788e9140dccd8009af90e92ce5a52ad5c2cd73: Have you managed to make peace between my father and Queen Sigrid yet?
textByHashes.3a13665c23f44f708f9f04211f6be2dca3c60ed5: I hear you made peace between our kingdom and Etceteria once more. Well done, [dear/.
textByHashes.67442bba8c7159ae9e6fedcb17e24ec5e311ad22: If you want to cheer someone on, sir, I suggest you find my brother.
textByHashes.1e41ea4e7874c7ec52aafa97166be87677e78afb: If you want to cheer someone on, madam, I suggest you find my brother.
textByHashes.e96fb789b50bc58063eca4cb893ba70b18b2f77e: If you want to cheer someone on, I suggest you find my brother.
textByHashes.94a712719c3c3a7f0037c7fe0cd08d1619ca3bb3: Sorry, sir, but I'm not interested.
textByHashes.9fde69dc01e4da50fe60c289eeda25e9f89123f1: Sorry, madam, but I'm not interested.
textByHashes.6c145f27372432fad65bbf98400e9281961c5e76: If you want to applaud someone, sir I suggest you find my brother.
textByHashes.b936b5183fec96621e369af4924e81bdc5fa8d07: If you want to applaud someone, madam I suggest you find my brother.
textByHashes.c5d89015fad432093c02bc283555567a1571827f: If you want to applaud someone, I suggest you find my brother.
textByHashes.b820ba296683935fbf5be1670ae63fa200d3fb3d: You realise, I hope, that many have tried to impress me.
textByHashes.de9ceb223c1b791d4bd70d3f1dcea407b05d4e08: That is true. However, I am willing to give you a chance; if you impress me enough, I will consider trusting you as our regent.
textByHashes.6d6d314652cd46ed5e649780224ba57a96dcd681: Yes; my father thinks it is a cowardly art, but I find there is just as much courage, and more skill, involved in going into combat with just a bow and quiver. What do you think?
textByHashes.0aea1eb40c10c2f736d073912d2383a9fc9fe4d9: I'm sorry you feel that way.
textByHashes.0f495ee1ef2784ddbac07efc14fff286fc1061c4: They never cease to bother me. They swarm around me like flies, all hoping to win my heart.
textByHashes.6d892d82dcb59ac5f653a9b5266577ba6ed36dc7: Perhaps I should use them for target practice!
textByHashes.70382849b839a503c9aa46519945e2cf61bb0972: I don't know why YOU bother.
textByHashes.b62d75b9c6568e3207ab472351a714a2e071e55e: How do you know I wouldn't hit you as well?
textByHashes.8c4a8ba6c026526bdbff41d19998866a104d1081: He's a bit scary sometimes, but he's always so nice to me! When I was young, I called him Uncle Ghrim.
textByHashes.2b2aab5e8bbf4ac735e4da82b39773a1c7b886b6: I'm sure he'd lighten up if you were nicer.
textByHashes.2017f2617543a4393bb8dd30eb214a7def4dc3ed: Yes, my father made a wise decision when he chose him to be his advisor.
textByHashes.0e8f2027e4bb9d68146f11cf6af2ce158f181265: You've already given me some, but thank you.
textByHashes.b94a921a910ab4b9b2267aef5c3db96402012902: Impressive. I like someone who knows how to dance.
textByHashes.5f7280f977053a45b6817aa989dd3637b0a49f7f: Let's not get ahead of ourselves now, sir!
textByHashes.784b58d99bad733dd81bb0da037c3529775666f7: Let's not get ahead of ourselves now, madam!
textByHashes.50ba34bd2a442d26b3e6f6ffe35bfa4c09a49fa4: Let's not get ahead of ourselves now!
textByHashes.3e0407bbbe9cdb311263f541fb3709a42a8b3db3: If you want to applaud someone, sir, I suggest you find my brother.
textByHashes.f0d4404021a239a4b9f87771da617be68d0e37d0: If you want to applaud someone, madam, I suggest you find my brother.
textByHashes.ac6ccca10bd003894780973fc9f8f57a96ad58f8: You are perhaps a more interesting person than I first took you for, sir...
textByHashes.2d944a7cf26294a47364458f2ae172f0c1f61408: You are perhaps a more interesting person than I first took you for, madam...
textByHashes.49b5491f66dac3c5b9c19856c525f70505381b1c: You are perhaps a more interesting person than I first took you for...
textByHashes.43a6cd68aeadc4938d0389c25d3567199de7492b: Oh, but I realise you have not yet told me your name!
textByHashes.c9191adc0376ab1ef06c0abdd3ce93a59d5f1336: [Then may I call you , sir/Then may I call you , madam/Then may I call you ?
textByHashes.3e6c8f2928502492df8879622aa6dc7aa84e785e: If you want to cheer someone on, , I suggest you find my brother.
textByHashes.3c1b5417b7cd27219bbeba332a7d44a4a1812181: Let's not get ahead of ourselves now, !
textByHashes.32140cb11703858e6ea472ad9b7bac32de98b2a1: If you want to applaud someone, , I suggest you find my brother.
textByHashes.809191b3095e53af9eaae7f1e51980576e7c0a54: Very little. It's not as if there's much to it... I might try to set up trade with other islands.
textByHashes.8bfe8105cf460ede51da0871fe09f8ffa9c92047: Fine. You try to do better!
textByHashes.d8c2b7d8e2af4f8991030d0887a3fd81b9dc3162: Watch it, or you won't get the chance to do better.
textByHashes.895a7d6c6bd2d070ad317f3cd9c75c8aefe08111: Well, nothing very exciting ever happened until my father declared war on Etceteria...
textByHashes.98fbb2b0d190702e4d8a188dd73301f7b4d0a5a1: Queen Sigrid of Etceteria insulted him.
textByHashes.fc2be61f3e8eac5f1efd4b0034699f98850b91ab: He realised that neither of us have an army.
textByHashes.bdd44084a0223bc79de6c5785f1a0c154f5e2dbe: I'm not sure. Even when I was little, archery always fascinated me.
textByHashes.915a673992c144963d927e3da46a4d62caafa029: It's good to know someone who shares my interests.
textByHashes.690b21d89acf8d172ed6f01605065ac08a7d68fe: I'll knit you a lovely jumper, shall I? It'll keep you warm when I have you exiled to the icelands.
textByHashes.623087a4d3d6c0b272f2f80be21ee065b66c2e0a: That's not really the kind of thing I'm interested in.
textByHashes.92a3d50cbbab4ee60fede283b9ae951789514201: You've already given me one, but thank you.
textByHashes.b9fdeb2742da24b0fa3e277b7d56481e8f4035fb: I must admit I am growing quite fond of you, .
textByHashes.3b5d869ea0a974d05cb7122275ec9e6c4e76c43f: Not yet, my dear; let us just say you have made it onto the shortlist.
textByHashes.8ec1bf108af15a98b0e5c92f618530729e495f7f: So, my dear, what do you think of Miscellania?
textByHashes.e335f1203818a401f6acf9cffe0ea4bc3795a9d9: Then perhaps you shouldn't be thinking of becoming its ruler.
textByHashes.11e1fc96a6d4fbb9726c865dda7279125ebba0b0: I'm quite fond of it myself...
textByHashes.fc4b4e0ee608f915b6506e29763207dab1938af7: We don't always get along, but I'm sure he's a nice guy at heart.
textByHashes.36b22e89edfa8df9180ed63ef1947766d7587210: [laugh]! Oh yes, quite the bard, he is.
textByHashes.8f1e618793c11488cd22bd2425850cd5a62b35e4: You don't sound like a nightingale yourself!
textByHashes.8e2da97215215d7f2b1915ee08db63166d385608: That's not a nice thing to say.
textByHashes.ca266581b794f33dcae4938fbc7e36a34e9d28c8: Not often, no. I sometimes go hunting...
textByHashes.68887aba8e9227c1d38cf2f51fa2c4dcb4e50115: I take what chance for practice I can get.
textByHashes.6df891ce46422f2777980618ac16b3022976d36b: Exactly! Perhaps you could take me with you sometime, dear.
textByHashes.9955ae68bf0d1bbb8f330c5b13515e156ceaa71e: If you want to cheer someone on, dear, I suggest you find my brother.
textByHashes.63aa5c9e170f9aa2002ba9dc6da5248472224f27: If you want to applaud someone, dear, I suggest you find my brother.
textByHashes.813ef04feacb5360029c440f2736f2e5b65dcea1: Oh, my dear, I thought you'd never ask! Of course I'll marry you!
textByHashes.e80467066aacb4047f72558916f98cea0778a240: We'll have to put off the actual ceremony until we can find a priest, but you can tell my father I have agreed to marry you.
textByHashes.4dbc2cace6196371e1f5e2adf1f0502138454b7c: What a beautiful gift! I think you'd make a great Thane running our realm. Can you inform my father that you have earned my trust?
textByHashes.7d04ac007d3f5f405a3effed525edf8d0a1124de: Oh, my dear, you've made me the happiest person alive.
textByHashes.5dedd2964fc97e2fe856523b2cc42053ac6e320f: Yes! We'll have to put off the actual ceremony until we can find a priest, but you can tell my father I have agreed to marry you.
textByHashes.aec3dd4d16e22e31e01026578409cadf2fdedee7: You've already given me one, remember?
textByHashes.17bc9028f78b2f61345717df88ab6e3288c196a7: How are you doing, darling? Have you convinced my father yet?
textByHashes.e6d0da0929c6336ce76ea7a48e4752226d646dc1: My darling, that is very thoughtful of you and you make a convincing point. Are you... absolutely sure?
textByHashes.0cebb2598c9ae88e40296732d0cce02cbb4feee7: I think you'll make a great Thane for our kingdom.
textByHashes.340a8ecfdb35fa7a817061c50b52476d75bcf518: Oh, my darling, you've made me the happiest person alive.
textByHashes.ece4bfe612153dab1ff73c1a891ecfd6b9bbdab2: I'm afraid not, darling. I don't think there is one to be had on these islands for love nor money...
textByHashes.c868a345467c00a65802dcf4ba1e2d1f6528bb16: Do not fear, though; I shall call for you as soon as one is found.
textByHashes.eab403191c1cbf02aebfdd7e064ed27c26a4ef2d: I hear you made peace between our kingdom and Etceteria once more. Well done, .
textByHashes.fcb495f3aeeedee0d04e976776fdbedb110b1c4d: I hear you made peace between our kingdom and Etceteria once more. Well done, dear friend.
textByHashes.7395a06b9c71dfeba52828068872e24894fb5a89: Yes! We'll have to put off the actual ceremony until we can find a priest, but I will tell my father I have agreed to marry you.
textByHashes.bb78b8384d6b397a6e49ac6de90a445cccdae52e: I hear you made peace between our kingdom and Etceteria once more. Well done, darling.
